summary: Block 177: Pre-Flight Purge + Feed Lockdown testing complete. Backend feed filtering verified - only NOW_SPINNING, NEW_HAUL, ISO, RANDOMIZER, DAILY_PROMPT, NOTE post types returned. Caption requirements enforced for NOW_SPINNING/NEW_HAUL/RANDOMIZER. Frontend PostTypeBadge icons and colors verified: ISO='Grail Find' (Gem icon, rose), DAILY_PROMPT='Daily Prompt' (MessageCircle, sky), NOTE='Album Note' (BookOpen, yellow), RANDOMIZER='Random Selection' (Shuffle, orange). Database has 3 users: katieintheafterglow, admin (real), groovetest (test).

PostCards.js: NOTE shows 'Album Note' with BookOpen icon (lines 88-97)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Block 177 feed lockdown implemented. Feed returns only allowed post types: NOW_SPINNING, NEW_HAUL, ISO, RANDOMIZER, DAILY_PROMPT, NOTE. Posts without captions filtered for NOW_SPINNING/NEW_HAUL/RANDOMIZER. Discogs bulk imports always hidden. PostTypeBadge renders distinctive icons: ISO='Grail Find' Gem (rose), DAILY_PROMPT='Daily Prompt' MessageCircle (sky), NOTE='Album Note' BookOpen (yellow), RANDOMIZER='Random Selection' Shuffle (orange). Database has 3 users after purge: katieintheafterglow, admin (real) + groovetest (test).
